defs: One who attributes diseases of the state of the humors.
One who has some peculiarity or eccentricity of character, which he indulges in odd or whimsical ways.
quotes: He [Roger de Coverley] . . . was a great humorist in all parts of his life.

defs: One who displays humor in speaking or writing; one who has a facetious fancy or genius; a wag; a droll; especially, one who writes or tells jokes as a profession.
quotes: The reputation of wits and humorists.
